text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Mejiro Ardan gets injured during training, I
rush her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Whew... It doesn't look like I'll need to go to the hospital. What a relief.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Even if I'd only ended up as an outpatient, my
family might have insisted I recover as an
inpatient.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: At any rate, let's get back to training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
After all I've experienced, I've come to know my
body and its limitations rather well. I needn't rest
just yet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I'm quite knowledgeable when it comes
to rehabilitation. Shall we resume with a milder
training regimen?
choice_data_list: Pushing yourself like this is too dangerous.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I'm quite knowledgeable when it comes
to rehabilitation. Shall we resume with a milder
training regimen?
choice_data_list: Pushing yourself like this is too dangerous.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Dangerous... You make a valid point. I was very
fortunate to avoid hospitalization, so I mustn't
test my luck...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I apologize for allowing my emotions to get the
better of me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I shall rest for today and focus on recovering.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A disappointed Mejiro Ardan trudges back to the
dorm.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. Knowing that I'll have your
help very much puts my mind at ease. I look
forward to our continued efforts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: One... Two... Thr—ngh?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm hardly putting any weight on it at all, but the
pain...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Yes. ...I ought to have taken my injury more
seriously.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Please excuse me. It appears this injury needs
tending to after all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A remorseful Mejiro Ardan returns to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Two more... One more... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That exercise serves to maintain muscle tone and
flexibility. ...I'm quite glad my body seems able to
handle it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Right then, let's move on. And don't worry, I'll
take care not to worsen my injury.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While monitoring her injury, Mejiro Ardan
completes a light training session.
